title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week brought critical stability improvements to OpsPal's Salesforce and HubSpot integrations. We fixed issues that were preventing some automations from launching and improved how OpsPal handles complex Salesforce deployments, especially those involving state and country data validation.

entries.headline: Salesforce deployments now detect state and country field conflicts
details: OpsPal now automatically identifies when Salesforce state and country picklist settings might conflict with your automation workflows
Deployments are more reliable with improved validation and automatic retry capabilities

entries.headline: Complex Salesforce deployments now run more reliably
details: Multi-step Salesforce automations now use improved coordination to prevent deployment failures

entries.headline: HubSpot automations launch successfully again
details: Resolved an issue that was preventing HubSpot automations from starting properly
